arts.ttl: Julen Lopetugui to gamble with West Ham selection at Newcastle United after sack expectation
arts.sum: West Ham United manager Julen Lopetegui is facing an uncertain future as his side travel to face Newcastle United on Monday night. West Ham have only recorded three league wins so far this term against Crystal Palace, Ipswich Town and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: David Moyes emerges as frontrunner to replace Steve Cooper at Leicester City
arts.sum: The veteran manager could be set for a return to management following Steve Cooper's sacking yesterday.

arts.sum: Newcastle are aiming to continue their impressive recent form when West Ham visit St James’ Park on Monday evening.
